public_witness.note: The de-identified OpenTimestamps witness step WAS executed and the proof is bound to this pack's contest_layer_root, but the stamp is not yet mined into a Bitcoin block (all calendars report PendingAttestation — expected, ~hours). Our verify-witness.mjs returns status=pending / witnessVerified=false, so NO verified public_witness is claimed yet. Re-run `ots upgrade` + verify-witness.mjs once Bitcoin confirms to flip this to verified.

identity_note: The identity-anchored externally_anchored rung is intentionally NOT pursued — the party requires anonymity, and that rung requires revealing a real identity via Sigstore/OIDC. The de-identified public witness (above) is the honest ceiling for an anonymous party; once Bitcoin confirms, independence stays distinct_key_only with a VERIFIED public_witness (not the identity rung).
